completed_tasks.name: Build fullscreen overlay and navigation foundation

remaining_tasks.name: Ship Awwwards-level cinematic motion pass and finalize visual QA

blockers.description: Current transition pipeline still has quality issues (blur/angle artifacts, repetitive feel) and does not yet match the requested premium bar.
blockers.workaround: Refactor to single-pass transition pipeline, remove pointer-follow parallax, add multi-directional and portal/world transitions with clean settle states.

human_actions_pending.action: Run visual acceptance review in browser after next motion pass
human_actions_pending.context: User is final authority for whether cinematic quality matches reference expectation.

decisions.decision: Creative direction locked to hybrid transition language
decisions.rationale: User selected hybrid approach: same world different zones + directional transitions + blade/sword mechanics.
User explicitly rejected mouse-follow behavior and reported blur/tilt glitches linked to current interaction effects.

decisions.decision: Final flow should include dedicated Questions + Sources ending
decisions.rationale: User requested Q&A and sources to be final destination instead of mixed reflection content.

next_action: In website/presentation.js, remove pointer-follow parallax and filter-heavy transitions, then implement multi-variant directional + portal transition set with stable settle states (no blur/tilt leftovers).
context_notes: User feedback is direct and quality-bar focused: current result still feels like PowerPoint. Priority is cinematic originality and flawless transition stability before any additional polish. Local preview server has been used on http://localhost:4173/.
